data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for 'Equipment failure cascade handling'.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Equipment failure cascade handling' as outlined in the linked use case. However, the prior step evidence does not provide any concrete checks or API reads that confirm the existence or functionality of this requirement. The lack of specific evidence related to equipment failure handling indicates that the validation cannot be conclusively performed, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of the implementation or verification of 'Equipment failure cascade handling'.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add checks for equipment failure cascade handling
